Speedrun: Your First Agentic AIP Workflow

Learn how to leverage AIP and the Ontology for an agentic workflow and AIP-human teaming.

 Register

 Already registered?

 Sign In 

 Cancel 

 Apply 

rate limit

Code not recognized.

 Activate

About this course

In this course you will work with clinic trial recruitment data and solve the problem of identifying eligible patients for clinical trials. Your goal is to learn how to leverage Foundry's AI and operational tooling to streamline the trial recruitment process. You will leverage encoded business critical processes using the Ontology for an agentic workflow and AIP-human teaming.

By the end of this course you will have a functional application for operational users, that leverages an automated AIP agent performing part of the clinical trial recruitment process, ultimately achieving AI and human teaming on this process.

This course typically takes 1 to 2 hours to complete.

 Requirements 

 Permissions & Help 

 The Use Case 

 Setting Up Your Project & Folder

 Introduction 

 Create a Foundry Learning Project 

 Create a Course-Specific Training Folder 

 Install Foundational Ontology & Understand Agentic Workflow

 Introduction 

 Install the Marketplace Product 

 Explore the Application 

 Understand Human-AI Teaming in the Agentic Workflow 

 Create an Agent

 Introduction 

 Create an AIP Logic 

 Configure Inputs 

 Compose the LLM Part of your Logic 

 Instruct Agent to Edit your Ontology 

 Preview Results of your Agent 

 Summary 

 Evaluate your Agent

 Introduction 

 Expose LLM Output to Evaluation 

 Create an Evaluation Suite 

 Configure an Evaluator 

 Configure Test Cases 

 Run the Evaluation Suite 

 Inspect the Results 

 Compare Results to Another LLM 

 Summary 

 Automate your Agent

 Introduction 

 Publish your Agent 

 Create Automation 

 Execute your Automation 

 Observe the Automation Effects 

 Add a New Patient 

 Observe Automatic Processing by your AIP Agent 

 Summary 

 Conclusion

 Next Steps: Further Automation and Human-AI Teaming 

 Next Steps: Interactive AIP Agents 

 Conclusion 

 About this course 

In this course you will work with clinic trial recruitment data and solve the problem of identifying eligible patients for clinical trials. Your goal is to learn how to leverage Foundry's AI and operational tooling to streamline the trial recruitment process. You will leverage encoded business critical processes using the Ontology for an agentic workflow and AIP-human teaming.

By the end of this course you will have a functional application for operational users, that leverages an automated AIP agent performing part of the clinical trial recruitment process, ultimately achieving AI and human teaming on this process.

This course typically takes 1 to 2 hours to complete.
